PowerShell(if \(Test-Path .next\) { try { Remove-Item .next -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "NEXT_REMOVED" } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Remove-Item .next -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path .next\) { "NEXT_PARTIAL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } else { "NEXT_REMOVED_2ND" } } } else { "NO_NEXT_DIR" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { taskkill /PID $c.OwningProcess /T /F 2>&1 | Out-String } else { "NO_LISTENER" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { "PORT 3000 IN USE by PID\(s\): " + \($conns.OwningProcess -join ', '\) } else { "PORT 3000 FREE" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== verify imported modules exist ==="; foreach \($p in @\("src/lib/workforce/exposure.ts","src/lib/workforce/workspaceTokens.ts","src/components/workforce/MiniDualProgressBar.tsx"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "OK  $p" } else { Write-Output "MISSING  $p" } }; Write-Output "=== exports check ==="; Select-String -Path "src/lib/workforce/exposure.ts" -Pattern "export \(function |const \)computeExposure" | Select-Object -First 1; Select-String -Path "src/lib/workforce/workspaceTokens.ts" -Pattern "severityMeta" | Select-Object -First 1; Select-String -Path "src/components/workforce/MiniDualProgressBar.tsx" -Pattern "MiniDualProgressBar" | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell($url="repos/manoharantrust22/AestaManagementApp/commits/550d1c2/status"; for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\) { $s = \(gh api $url --jq '.state' 2>$null\); $t = \(Get-Date\).ToString\("HH:mm:ss"\); Write-Output "$t  state=$s"; if \($s -eq "success" -or $s -eq "failure" -or $s -eq "error"\) { Write-Output "FINAL: $s"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 20 })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== untracked files, grouped by extension ==="; git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\\?\\? ' } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -replace '^\\?\\? ',''\) } | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Ext = [System.IO.Path]::GetExtension\($_\); Path = $_ } } | Group-Object Ext | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("{0,-8} {1}" -f \($_.Name -replace '^$','<none>'\), $_.Count\) }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== any untracked that are NOT .png/.yml/.md ? ==="; git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\\?\\? ' } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -replace '^\\?\\? ',''\) } | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '\\.\(png|yml|md\)$' })

PowerShell($pngs = git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\.png$' }; Write-Output "=== will delete $\($pngs.Count\) .png files ==="; $pngs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }; $pngs | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "=== remaining untracked .png after delete ==="; \(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | Where-Object { $_ -match '\\.png$' }\).Count)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== remaining untracked \(non-docs\) ==="; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^docs/' }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== git status short ==="; git status -sb)

PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; $mine = $out | Select-String -Pattern 'useMaterialThreads|useMaterialPurchases'; if \($mine\) { Write-Output "ERRORS IN MY FILES:"; $mine } else { Write-Output "No errors in useMaterialThreads.ts / useMaterialPurchases.ts" }; Write-Output "---- Non-test errors \(excluding .test/.spec/__tests__\): ----"; \($out | Select-String -Pattern '\\.tsx?\\\(' | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '\\.test\\.|\\.spec\\.|__tests__' }\))

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $procs = $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $procs\) { $pr = Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Port 3000 owner: PID=$p Name=$\($pr.ProcessName\)" } } else { "Nothing listening on 3000" }; $conns2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns2\) { \($conns2.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique\) | ForEach-Object { $pr=Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Port 3002 owner: PID=$_ Name=$\($pr.ProcessName\)" } } else { "Nothing listening on 3002" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; "PID $\($p.Id\): $\($p.ProcessName\)"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($p.Id\)"\).CommandLine } else { "Nothing listening on 3000" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{n='CmdLine';e={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-List; "---NETSTAT---"; netstat -ano | Select-String ":3000\\s")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$_" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, @{N='Cmd';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(140,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} } | Format-List } else { "no listener on 3000" })

PowerShell($p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=21640" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output \("PID 21640 = " + $p.Name + " :: " + $p.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(140,$p.CommandLine.Length\)\)\) } else { Write-Output "PID 21640 gone" })
